cases.subject: Sponsoring Robert Scoble's AI demo series
cases.body: Hi Robert, I'm Maya from SpatialDemo. We want to sponsor two segments in your AI demo series next month. Our budget is $15,000 and we'd like to discuss creative control and timeline this week.
cases.required_quote: We want to sponsor two segments in your AI demo series next month. Our budget is $15,000

cases.subject: Robert as guest on Frontier Builders
cases.body: Robert, we'd like to book you as a guest for Frontier Builders to discuss AI agents and the future of consumer hardware. Recording slots are open June 4 or June 6, and we can send prep notes today.
cases.required_quote: we'd like to book you as a guest

cases.subject: Intro to a possible Unaligned sponsor
cases.body: I want to introduce you to the CMO at VantaGrid. They are actively looking for creator partnerships in AI infrastructure and asked specifically whether Robert Scoble has Q3 sponsorship inventory.
cases.required_quote: asked specifically whether Robert Scoble has Q3 sponsorship inventory

cases.subject: Demo request for Robert
cases.body: Could we show Robert our new multi-agent desktop next week? We think it fits Unaligned's agent coverage and we are open to a paid launch segment if the product is a fit.
cases.required_quote: we are open to a paid launch segment

cases.subject: Collaboration around smart glasses launch
cases.body: We are launching smart glasses for field technicians and want to collaborate with Robert on a hands-on launch video. We can provide demo units, engineering access, and paid media support.
cases.required_quote: want to collaborate with Robert on a hands-on launch video

cases.subject: 10 AI stories you missed
cases.body: Here are this week's biggest AI stories, funding rounds, and product launches. Subscribe for more and forward this newsletter to a friend.

cases.subject: Collaboration opportunity
cases.body: Dear website owner, we can improve your rankings with high authority backlinks. Let's connect about sponsored guest posts and link insertions.

cases.subject: Application for assistant role
cases.body: I am applying for the assistant role I saw online. My resume is attached and I am available for interviews this week.

cases.subject: Your receipt from Notion
cases.body: Your payment of $96.00 to Notion was successful. This receipt is for your records.

cases.subject: Quick question
cases.body: I help founders grow revenue with AI automation. Would you be open to a quick call next week to explore synergies?

cases.subject: Would love to connect
cases.body: Robert, I have followed your work for years and would love to connect sometime. I think there may be some overlap with what we are building.

cases.subject: Press release: new AI platform
cases.body: LaunchWire announces a new AI platform for enterprises. Please see the attached press release and let us know if you need anything else.

leads.title: Sponsoring Robert Scoble's AI demo series
leads.notes: Maya from SpatialDemo wants to sponsor two segments in Robert Scoble's AI demo series next month with a specific budget of $15,000. This represents a clear sponsorship opportunity with defined financial commitment and timeline.
leads.evidence: We want to sponsor two segments in your AI demo series next month. Our budget is $15,000 and we'd like to discuss creative control and timeline this week.
leads.reply_hook: I'm interested in discussing how we can make the most of your $15,000 sponsorship budget for the AI demo series next month.
leads.name: Maya Chen

leads.title: Robert as guest on Frontier Builders
leads.notes: Evan from FrontierPod wants to book Robert Scoble as a guest on their Frontier Builders podcast to discuss AI agents and consumer hardware. They have specific recording dates available and are ready to provide prep materials.
leads.evidence: we'd like to book you as a guest for Frontier Builders to discuss AI agents and the future of consumer hardware. Recording slots are open June 4 or June 6, and we can send prep notes today.
leads.reply_hook: I'd be interested in discussing the AI agents and consumer hardware topic for Frontier Builders on June 4 or 6.
leads.name: Evan Brooks

leads.title: Intro to a possible Unaligned sponsor
leads.notes: Priya from VentureBridge wants to introduce Robert Scoble to the CMO at VantaGrid who is actively looking for creator partnerships in AI infrastructure and specifically asked about Robert's Q3 sponsorship inventory.
leads.evidence: I want to introduce you to the CMO at VantaGrid. They are actively looking for creator partnerships in AI infrastructure and asked specifically whether Robert Scoble has Q3 sponsorship inventory.
leads.reply_hook: I'd be interested in learning more about this VantaGrid CMO and their interest in creator partnerships for AI infrastructure.
leads.name: Priya Shah

leads.title: Demo request for Robert
leads.notes: Luis from NeuralDesk.ai wants to show Robert Scoble their new multi-agent desktop product and is open to a paid launch segment if the product fits Unaligned's agent coverage.
leads.evidence: Could we show Robert our new multi-agent desktop next week? We think it fits Unaligned's agent coverage and we are open to a paid launch segment if the product is a fit.
leads.reply_hook: I'd be interested in seeing your multi-agent desktop product and discussing how it fits with Unaligned's agent coverage.
leads.name: Luis Romero

leads.title: Collaboration around smart glasses launch
leads.notes: Nina from GlassForge wants to collaborate with Robert Scoble on a hands-on launch video for smart glasses aimed at field technicians, offering demo units, engineering access, and paid media support.
leads.evidence: We are launching smart glasses for field technicians and want to collaborate with Robert on a hands-on launch video. We can provide demo units, engineering access, and paid media support.
leads.reply_hook: I'd be interested in discussing how we can collaborate on a hands-on launch video for your smart glasses for field technicians.
leads.name: Nina Park

leads.title: Sponsoring Robert Scoble's AI demo series
leads.notes: Maya Chen from SpatialDemo wants to sponsor two segments of Robert's AI demo series next month. She has a confirmed budget of $15,000 and is requesting a discussion this week to finalize creative control and timeline.
leads.evidence: We want to sponsor two segments in your AI demo series next month. Our budget is $15,000 and we'd like to discuss creative control and timeline this week.
leads.reply_hook: I’d be happy to hop on a call this week to discuss creative control and timeline for the two AI demo series segments you mentioned.
leads.name: Maya Chen

leads.title: Robert as guest on Frontier Builders
leads.notes: Evan Brooks from Frontier Builders wants to book Robert as a guest to discuss AI agents and consumer hardware. They have specific recording slots available on June 4 or June 6 and are ready to send prep materials immediately.
leads.evidence: we'd like to book you as a guest for Frontier Builders to discuss AI agents and the future of consumer hardware. Recording slots are open June 4 or June 6, and we can send prep notes today.
leads.reply_hook: June 4 or June 6 both work for me; please send over the prep notes so we can lock in the recording slot.
leads.name: Evan Brooks

leads.title: Intro to a possible Unaligned sponsor
leads.notes: Priya Shah is introducing the CMO at VantaGrid, who is actively seeking creator partnerships in AI infrastructure. They specifically asked about Robert Scoble’s Q3 sponsorship inventory to move forward with a potential deal.
leads.evidence: They are actively looking for creator partnerships in AI infrastructure and asked specifically whether Robert Scoble has Q3 sponsorship inventory.
leads.reply_hook: I’d be glad to connect with the VantaGrid CMO directly to discuss Q3 sponsorship inventory and how we can align with their AI infrastructure goals.
leads.name: Priya Shah

leads.title: Demo request for Robert
leads.notes: Luis Romero from NeuralDesk wants to demo their new multi-agent desktop next week, noting it aligns with Unaligned’s agent coverage. They are open to structuring a paid launch segment if the product meets their criteria.
leads.evidence: We think it fits Unaligned's agent coverage and we are open to a paid launch segment if the product is a fit.
leads.reply_hook: Next week works for a demo; please send over the multi-agent desktop details so I can review how it aligns with our agent coverage before we discuss a paid segment.
leads.name: Luis Romero

leads.title: Collaboration around smart glasses launch
leads.notes: Nina Park from GlassForge is launching smart glasses for field technicians and wants to partner with Robert on a hands-on launch video. They are prepared to provide demo units, direct engineering access, and paid media support for the project.
leads.evidence: We are launching smart glasses for field technicians and want to collaborate with Robert on a hands-on launch video. We can provide demo units, engineering access, and paid media support.
leads.reply_hook: I’m interested in testing the smart glasses firsthand; please send the demo units and engineering contact details so we can plan the hands-on launch video.
leads.name: Nina Park
